mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : FileBoxInfoDAO.listFileBoxTree 설 명 : 파일함 트리 조회 */
SELECT LEVEL AS depth, ATFL_BOX_ID AS fileBoxCd, UP_ATFL_BOX_ID AS parFileBoxCd, ATFL_BOXNM AS folderNm, SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(REPLACE(TO_CHAR(ATFL_BOX_ID), '_', ''), '_') AS path, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_BOX AA WHERE AA.UP_ATFL_BOX_ID = A.ATFL_BOX_ID ) AS childrenCnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.UP_ATFL_BOX_ID ORDER BY A.ATFL_BOX_ID) AS firstChild, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.UP_ATFL_BOX_ID ORDER BY A.ATFL_BOX_ID DESC) AS lastChild FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_BOX A WHERE ATFL_BOX_TYCD = 'FOLDER' AND RGTR_ID = #{rgtrId} START WITH UP_ATFL_BOX_ID IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR ATFL_BOX_ID = UP_ATFL_BOX_ID ORDER BY SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(REPLACE(TO_CHAR(ATFL_BOX_ID), '_', ''), '_')

/* SQL ID : FileBoxInfoDAO.listFileBox 설 명 : 파일함의 한 폴더내 파일 목록 조회 */
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT -- LEVEL AS depth, A.ATFL_BOX_ID AS fileBoxCd, A.UP_ATFL_BOX_ID AS parFileBoxCd, A.ATFL_BOX_ID AS fileSn, A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD AS fileBoxTypeCd, -- (SELECT CDNM -- FROM TB_ORG_CODE -- WHERE CTGRCD = 'ATFL_BOX_TYCD' -- AND CD = A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD -- AND ORG_ID = '') AS fileBoxTypeNm, A.ATFL_BOXNM AS fileBoxNm, CASE WHEN A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD = 'FOLDER' THEN A.ATFL_BOXNM ELSE A.ATFL_BOXNM || '.' || B.FILE_EXTNM END AS fileBoxFullNm, LOWER(B.FILE_EXTNM) AS fileExt, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REG_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD (HH24:MI)') AS regDt, B.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(REPLACE(TO_CHAR(A.ATFL_BOX_ID), '_', ''), '_') AS path, SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(REPLACE(TO_CHAR(A.ATFL_BOXNM), '>', ''), '>') AS folderPath, C.ATFL_REPO_PATH AS fileType, CASE WHEN A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD != 'FOLDER' THEN B.FILE_PATH || '/' || B.FILE_SAVENM || '|' || B.FILENM ELSE NULL END AS downloadUrl, CASE WHEN A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD = 'MOV' THEN B.FILE_PATH || '/' || B.FILE_SAVENM ELSE NULL END AS contentUrl, A.REG_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_BOX A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL B ON A.ATFL_BOX_ID = B.ATFL_BOX_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL_REPO C ON B.ATFL_REPO_ID = C.ATFL_REPO_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.ATFL_BOXNM LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
AND A.UP_ATFL_BOX_ID = #{selectedFileBoxCd}
AND A.UP_ATFL_BOX_ID IS NULL
AND LOWER(B.FILE_EXTNM) = 'mp4'
AND LOWER(B.FILE_EXTNM) = 'pdf'
AND A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD = 'IMG'
AND ( LOWER(B.FILE_EXTNM) NOT IN('mp4', 'pdf') AND A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD != 'IMG' )
START WITH A.UP_ATFL_BOX_ID IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR A.ATFL_BOX_ID = A.UP_ATFL_BOX_ID ) A ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.fileBoxTypeCd = 'FOLDER' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, A.PATH

/* SQL ID : FileBoxInfoDAO.selectFileBoxUseRate 설 명 : 자신의 파일함 사용률 조회 */
SELECT fileLimitSize , fileUseSize , NVL(CASE WHEN fileUseRate > 100 THEN 100 ELSE fileUseRate END, 0) AS fileUseRate FROM ( SELECT NVL(A.ATFL_MAXSZ, 0) AS fileLimitSize , NVL(A.FILE_USE_SIZE, 0) AS fileUseSize , NVL(FLOOR(A.FILE_USE_SIZE / A.ATFL_MAXSZ * 100), 0) AS fileUseRate FROM ( SELECT A.USER_AUTHRT_ID , NVL(ATFL_MAXSZ, CASE WHEN AUTH_ODR = 1 THEN 1024 ELSE 3072 END) * 1024 * 1024 AS ATFL_MAXSZ , ( SELECT SUM(BB.FILE_SIZE) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_BOX AA JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL BB ON AA.ATFL_BOX_ID = BB.ATFL_BOX_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL_REPO CC ON BB.ATFL_REPO_ID = CC.ATFL_REPO_ID AND CC.ATFL_REPO_PATH != 'TRANSFER' WHERE AA.RGTR_ID = A.USER_AUTHRT_ID ) AS FILE_USE_SIZE FROM ( SELECT A.USER_AUTHRT_ID , MAX(NVL(A.ATFL_MAXSZ, B.ATFL_MAXSZ)) AS ATFL_MAXSZ , MAX( CASE WHEN A.MENU_TYCD IN ('ADMIN', 'PROFESSOR') THEN 2 WHEN A.MENU_TYCD IN ('STUDENT') THEN 1 END ) AS AUTH_ODR FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT A JOIN TB_LMS_AUTHRT_GRP B ON A.MENU_TYCD = B.MENU_TYCD AND A.AUTHRT_GRP_ID = B.AUTHRT_GRPCD AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE A.USER_AUTHRT_ID = #{userId} AND B.ORG_ID = #{orgId} GROUP BY A.USER_AUTHRT_ID ) A ) A ) A

/* SQL ID : FileBoxInfoDAO.listDeleteFile 설 명 : 삭제할 파일목록 조회 */
SELECT A.FILE_ID AS fileSn, B.ATFL_REPO_PATH AS repoPath, B.FILE_PATH AS filePath, B.FILE_SAVENM AS fileSaveNm FROM ( SELECT ATFL_BOX_ID, UP_ATFL_BOX_ID, FILE_ID, LEVEL AS LVL FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_BOX WHERE RGTR_ID = #{mdfrId} START WITH ATFL_BOX_ID = #{fileBoxCd} CONNECT BY PRIOR ATFL_BOX_ID = UP_ATFL_BOX_ID ) A JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL B ON A.FILE_ID = B.FILE_ID

/* SQL ID : FileBoxInfoDAO.selectFileBoxDetailInfo 설 명 : 파일 또는 폴더 상세정보 조회 */ SELECT A.ATFL_BOX_ID AS fileBoxCd , A.ATFL_BOXNM AS fileBoxNm , CASE WHEN A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD = 'FOLDER' THEN A.ATFL_BOXNM ELSE A.ATFL_BOXNM || '.' || B.FILE_EXTNM END AS fileBoxFullNm , (SELECT MAX(CDNM) FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'ATFL_BOX_TYCD' AND CD = A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD) AS fileBoxTypeNm , LOWER(B.FILE_EXTNM) AS fileExt , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDt , A.FILE_ID AS fileSn , B.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize , B.FILE_PATH AS folderPath , B.ATFL_REPO_PATH AS fileType , CASE WHEN A.ATFL_BOX_TYCD = 'FOLDER' OR A.FILE_ID IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE B.FILE_PATH || '/' || B.FILE_SAVENM || '|' || B.FILENM END AS downloadUrl FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_BOX A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL B ON A.FILE_ID = B.FILE_ID WHERE A.ATFL_BOX_ID = #{selectedFileBoxCd} AND A.RGTR_ID = #{rgtrId}

/* SQL ID : FileBoxInfoDAO.listFullFolderPath 설 명 : 선택한 폴더의 full 경로 조회 */
SELECT LEVEL AS depth, ATFL_BOX_ID, UP_ATFL_BOX_ID, ATFL_BOXNM AS folderPath FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_BOX WHERE RGTR_ID = #{rgtrId} AND ATFL_BOX_ID = #{selectedFileBoxCd} START WITH ATFL_BOX_ID = #{selectedFileBoxCd} CONNECT BY PRIOR UP_ATFL_BOX_ID = ATFL_BOX_ID ORDER BY LEVEL DESC

/* SQL ID : FileBoxInfoDAO.selectFileBoxSimpleInfo 설 명 : 파일함의 간단 정보 조회 */ SELECT ATFL_BOX_ID AS fileBoxCd , FILE_ID AS fileSn , ATFL_BOX_TYCD AS fileBoxTypeCd , ATFL_BOXNM AS fileBoxNm FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_BOX WHERE ATFL_BOX_ID = #{fileBoxCd}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : FileBoxInfoDAO.updateSysFileNm 설 명 : 시스템 파일함의 파일명 변경 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_ATFL SET FILENM = #{fileBoxNm} || '.' || FILE_EXTNM WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileSn}
